basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) Research Associate (RA) Notification 2026 has been released on 07 July 2026 on the official website iitjammu.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Jammu Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/women and physically handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in the relevant or allied discipline, with B.E./B.Tech. In Electronic Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE), or Computer Engineering with Sensors Technology from a recognized University/Institute.
qualification.details: Ph.D. in the relevant or allied discipline, with B.E./B.Tech. In Electronic Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE), or Computer Engineering with Sensors Technology from a recognized University/Institute.

salary_details.details: Rs. 49,000/- + HRA as applicable Per Month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Research Associate (RA) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Jammu Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Jammu Research Associate (RA) Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Jammu Research Associate (RA) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Research Associate (RA) position at IIT Jammu is 15th August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate (RA) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in a relevant or allied discipline. Additionally, a B.E./B.Tech. degree in Electronic Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE), or Computer Engineering with Sensors Technology from a recognized university is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate (RA) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate (RA) post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/women and physically handicapped candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate (RA) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate (RA) position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 49,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate (RA) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate (RA) position in the IIT Jammu Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the IIT Jammu Research Associate (RA) recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Research Associate (RA) recruitment at IIT Jammu.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate (RA) position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate (RA) position at IIT Jammu will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent job or a contract position?
faq.answer: The Research Associate (RA) position at IIT Jammu is a contract-based job. The duration of the contract will be as per the institute's policy and project requirements.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification carefully before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at the Indian Institute of Technology Jammu, Jammu, Jammu and Kashmir, with the pincode 182211.
